items.notes: Created meta/main.yml with role metadata including description, license, platforms, and tags.
Created main.yml that conditionally includes either deploy_automate.yml or deploy_chef_server.yml based on the chef_automate_deployment_type variable.
Created defaults/main.yml with default variables for hostname, user configuration, organization configuration, and file paths.
Created README.md with role documentation including requirements, variables, dependencies, example playbook, and license information.
Created deploy_automate.yml with tasks to set hostname, kernel parameters, download Chef Automate CLI, deploy Chef Automate and Chef Infra Server, and create user and organization.
Created deploy_chef_server.yml with tasks to set hostname, kernel parameters, download Chef Automate CLI, deploy Chef Infra Server only, and create user and organization.

items.description: Ansible system collection for sysctl and hostname management
items.notes: Created requirements.yml with ansible.posix and community.general collections.

items.description: Ansible community general collection for various utilities

items.notes: Created empty handlers/main.yml file as no handlers are needed for this role.
